hero.title: Turn one idea into a whole series
hero.subtitle: AI writes the script, you approve every word. Narro builds the video — consistent characters, voice, and style across every episode — and publishes straight to YouTube.

steps.title: Drop in your idea
steps.body: A rough premise and a target length are enough. Or paste a finished script.

steps.title: AI writes the script — you approve it
steps.body: Narro drafts narration sized to your target duration. Edit every word before anything is produced.

steps.title: Scenes and images, matched automatically
steps.body: The script is split into scenes, matched against your series asset library, and missing images are generated in your series style.

steps.title: Video out, straight to YouTube
steps.body: Voice-over, subtitles, motion and music — rendered server-side and published to your channel in one click.

features.title: Built for series, not one-off clips

items.title: Script-to-length AI
items.body: Tell it 8 minutes, get an 8-minute script — in your series' language and tone.

items.title: Series asset library
items.body: Characters, locations and props live at the series level, so episode 10 looks like episode 1.

items.title: On-brand image generation
items.body: Missing scene images are generated from your series style bible — no prompt engineering.

items.title: Multi-language narration
items.body: Vietnamese and English text-to-speech with a fixed voice per series.

items.title: Subtitles that never mishear
items.body: Captions come from your script, not speech recognition — 100% accurate.

items.title: One-click YouTube publish
items.body: Connect your channel once; every built episode uploads with title, description and tags.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No per-minute charges. Just a flat plan that scales with your ambition.
pricing.footnote: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required for Free tier.

free.name: Free
free.description: Start exploring Narro without a credit card.

studio.name: Studio
studio.description: For studios and agencies at scale.

cta.title: Your first episode is one idea away
cta.body: Start free, keep every video you make.

footer.tagline: The AI video agent for storytellers.
